title: DataConnectorS3 - Metadata API
description: Represents the connection information specific to Amazon S3.

fileNameWildcard.description: Optional. File or Wildcard (*) to be used when finding files.

importFromDirectory.description: Path from the directory to where files are located.

masterLabel.description: The UI name for the S3 data connector.

s3BucketName.description: Optional. The Amazon S3 Name of the Bucket.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a DataConnectorS3 component.
